title: The Race Across America
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Bruce Hyena signs Geronimo up for a 3,000-mile bike race across America, all for a good cause! 🚴

q.en: What was the first mysterious anonymous package that arrived on Geronimo's doorstep?
q.zh: 送到杰罗尼摩家门口的第一个神秘匿名包裹里装的是什么？

explain.en: Geronimo found a package on his stoop addressed to him; inside were bicycle handlebars, followed later by pedals and a helmet.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩在门前台阶上发现一个寄给他的包裹，里面是自行车车把，之后又陆续收到了脚踏板和头盔。

q.en: Which sporty friend signed Geronimo up for the Race Across America without really asking?
q.zh: 是哪只爱运动的小伙伴没怎么问杰罗尼摩，就替他报名参加了横穿美国的比赛？

explain.en: Bruce Hyena burst in and announced he had already signed Geronimo up for the Race Across America, saying they'd bike across the whole country.
explain.zh: 布鲁斯·鬣狗冲进门宣布，他已经替杰罗尼摩报名参加了横穿美国的比赛，说他们要骑车穿越整个国家。

q.en: Where does the Race Across America begin and end?
q.zh: 横穿美国的比赛起点和终点分别在哪里？

options.en: It starts near San Diego, California, and ends in Annapolis, Maryland
options.zh: 从加利福尼亚州的圣迭戈附近出发，到马里兰州的安纳波利斯结束

options.en: It starts in New York and ends in Los Angeles
options.zh: 从纽约出发，到洛杉矶结束

options.en: It starts in Chicago and ends in Miami
options.zh: 从芝加哥出发，到迈阿密结束

options.en: It starts in Texas and ends in Alaska
options.zh: 从得克萨斯出发，到阿拉斯加结束

explain.en: The race is more than 3,000 miles long, starting on the West Coast near San Diego, California, and finishing on the East Coast in Annapolis, Maryland.
explain.zh: 这场比赛全长三千多英里，从西海岸加利福尼亚州的圣迭戈附近出发，在东海岸马里兰州的安纳波利斯冲线。

q.en: For what good cause did Bruce decide to dedicate the race?
q.zh: 布鲁斯决定把这场比赛献给什么善举？

options.en: Sick mouselets with leukemia at Hope Hospital
options.zh: 希望医院里患白血病的老鼠小朋友们

explain.en: Bruce volunteers at Hope Hospital's wing for children with leukemia and dedicates the race to those 'little heroes' to raise money for them.
explain.zh: 布鲁斯在希望医院收治白血病儿童的病区做志愿者，他把比赛献给那些“小英雄”，为他们筹集善款。

q.en: On the N.M.C. team, who is the mechanic crazy about bikes who fixes Geronimo's flat tire?
q.zh: 在N.M.C.车队里，谁是那个痴迷自行车、帮杰罗尼摩补好漏气的轮胎的修车师？

explain.en: Buzz is Team N.M.C.'s mechanic, crazy about bikes since age nine; in the Colorado mountains he fixed Geronimo's flat tire in a flash.
explain.zh: 巴斯是N.M.C.车队的修车师，从九岁起就痴迷自行车；在科罗拉多山区，他一眨眼就把杰罗尼摩漏气的轮胎修好了。

q.en: In the hot Arizona desert at night, why did Geronimo faint while riding?
q.zh: 在炎热的亚利桑那沙漠的夜晚，杰罗尼摩骑车时为什么会晕倒？

options.en: He forgot to drink enough water and became dehydrated
options.zh: 他忘了喝足够的水，脱水了

options.en: He was stung by a scorpion

explain.en: It was 105 degrees and Geronimo ignored V-Doc's advice to drink plenty of fluids; he got dehydrated, had a fever, and fainted. Bruce then pedalped eight hours for him.
explain.zh: 当时气温高达105华氏度，杰罗尼摩没听V医生多喝水的话，脱水发烧晕了过去。布鲁斯随后替他骑了八个小时。

q.en: After nearly 130 miles, what famous American highway did Geronimo turn onto?
q.zh: 骑了将近130英里后，杰罗尼摩拐上了哪条著名的美国公路？

options.zh: 通往得克萨斯的高速公路

explain.en: After a few hours Geronimo turned onto Route 66, the most famous highway in the United States, established in 1926 and nicknamed the 'Mother Road.'
explain.zh: 骑了几小时后，杰罗尼摩拐上了66号公路——美国最著名的公路，建于1926年，绰号“母亲之路”。

q.en: Which giant natural wonder carved by the Colorado River did the racers pass through?
q.zh: 选手们途经的、由科罗拉多河冲刷而成的巨大自然奇观是什么？

explain.en: They reached the Grand Canyon in Arizona, a mile-deep crack in the rock formed over millions of years by the path of the Colorado River.
explain.zh: 他们抵达了亚利桑那州的大峡谷——一道深达一英里的裂谷，是科罗拉多河历经数百万年冲刷而成的。

q.en: In the Colorado mountains, how did the temperature change from the desert below?
q.zh: 到了科罗拉多山区，气温相比山下的沙漠发生了怎样的变化？

options.en: It dropped from 120°F in the desert to 40°F in the mountains
options.zh: 从沙漠里的120华氏度降到了山里的40华氏度
从40华氏度升到了120华氏度
跌破冰点降到零下20华氏度

explain.en: Geronimo was used to 120°F in the desert, but in the Colorado mountains the temperature dropped to 40°F, making the climbing twice as hard.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩已经习惯了沙漠里120华氏度的高温，可到了科罗拉多山区气温骤降到40华氏度，让爬坡难上加难。

q.en: Near the finish in Annapolis, what mistake almost got the N.M.C. team disqualified?
q.zh: 在安纳波利斯临近终点时，什么失误差点让N.M.C.车队被取消资格？

options.en: The team car (Tex and Buzz) took the wrong road and left Geronimo without his escort
options.zh: 工作车（特克斯和巴斯）拐错了路，把杰罗尼摩甩在后面没了护送

explain.en: Race rules say the team car must escort its cyclist to the finish; Tex and Buzz turned onto the wrong road, so Geronimo spun around and sprinted back to catch the car before the line.
explain.zh: 比赛规定工作车必须护送车手到终点；特克斯和巴斯拐错了路，于是杰罗尼摩掉头拼命骑回去追上工作车，才赶在终点前归队。
